item.title:
RapSheet: Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 3min “I was so fired up, man!”
#49ers RB Christian McCaffrey joined The Insiders to discuss No
item.description:
Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 3min “I was so fired up, man!”
#49ers RB Christian McCaffrey joined The Insiders to discuss Notre Dame RB Jeremiyah Love's prospects, how fired up he was that his team signed FA WR Mike Evans, and much more. 8:11 6 9 107 19 mil

item.title: robpizzola: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 11min I tried to warn people about this scumbag loser not too long ago. Another POS bookie try
item.description:
Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 11min I tried to warn people about this scumbag loser not too long ago. Another POS bookie trying to drum up business by posting fake screenshots of big bets. He books on Buckeye 2 and wants you to think he's somehow also betting 50k a pop on another Buckeye 2 when in reality he is Mostrar más Cita THEARBFATHER @TheArbFather · 53min SCAMMER @leviathanlocks
(Please RT to help others not get scammed) DO NOT USE @leviathanlocks
I signed up back in January and deposited $1,500.
Within 7–10 days, they took away my Prop Builder… which was literally the #1 reason I signed up in the first place.
Anyone in 2 1 10 2 mil

item.title: StaceyDales: Around The NFL reposteó StaceyDales @StaceyDales · 15min There’s a lot to love when it comes to Hoosiers wideout Omar Co
item.description: Around The NFL reposteó StaceyDales @StaceyDales · 15min There’s a lot to love when it comes to Hoosiers wideout Omar Cooper Jr — amidst what’s considered a deep class overall in terms of the position. We break down the buzz around him here @nflnetwork #TheInsiders 1 5 5 mil
